subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1913-12-22 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Welcome! How are you! No strength is left in me because I have talked so much, from morning until now
subcodes.first_line_orig: خوش آمدید احوال شما چطور است از بس از صبح تا بحال من حرف زده ام دیگر قوت
subcodes.subjects: @the Christian clergy, @stories; anecdotes, @Muhammad; Islam, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
